zh.Trefor in Gyffylliog, Denbighshire, Wale: 英國威爾斯丹比爾特福 在 利格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Angharad verch Hwfa於大約1135年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾特福 在 利格時，她的父親Hwfa ap Cynwrig6歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Owain6歲。她於1161年與Cynwrig ap Iorwerth在英國威爾斯可爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1173年在英國威爾斯丹比爾享年39歲。

Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

Vietnamese (Hứa): from the Chinese surname 許, see Xu 2.

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Angharad verch Hwfa was born about 1135, in Trefor in Gyffylliog, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Hwfa ap Cynwrig, was 6 and her mother, Gwenllian ferch Owain, was 6. She married Cynwrig ap Iorwerth in 1161, in Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1173, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

Elle a épousé Cynwrig ap Iorwerth en 1161, à Clwyd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1173, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Hwfaが約1135年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアトレフォー イン グイフイリオグで生まれた時，父Hwfa ap Cynwrigは6歳，母Gwenllian ferch Owainは6歳であった。1161年にイギリスウェールズクルウイドでCynwrig ap Iorwerthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1173年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで39歳で死去した。

ko.Trefor in Gyffylliog, Denbighshire, Wale: 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 트레포 인 그이피리오그
ko.lifeSummary: Angharad verch Hwfa(이)가 대략 1135년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 트레포 인 그이피리오그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hwfa ap Cynwrig(은)는 6세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Owain(은)는 6세였다. 그녀는 1161년 영국 웨일스 클w이드에서 Cynwrig ap Iorwerth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1173년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Angharad verch Hwfa nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Trefor in Gyffylliog, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hwfa ap Cynwrig, tinha 6 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Owain, tinha 6 anos. Ela casou-se com Cynwrig ap Iorwerth em 1161, em Clwyd, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1173, em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 39 anos.

ru.Trefor in Gyffylliog, Denbighshire, Wale: трефор ин гиффиллиог, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Angharad verch Hwfa родилась около 1135 г. в местности трефор ин гиффиллиог, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hwfa ap Cynwrig было 6 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Owain, 6. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Cynwrig ap Iorwerth в 1161 г. в местности клвид, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1173 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.
